subcodes.first_line: Convey yearning greetings unto his honor Áqá Mírzá 'Abdu'lláh, descendant of Samandar, and say: that entire family is encompassed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا میرزا عبداللّه سلیل سمندر را تحیّت مشتاقانه برسان و بگو آنخانواده طرّاً مشمول
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
